# DispatchPredicate.notOnQueue(_:)

**Case**

A predicate that indicates the evaluated context is not the associated dispatch queue.

## Declaration

```swift
case notOnQueue(DispatchQueue)
```

## Predicates

- **DispatchPredicate.onQueue(_:)**: A predicate that indicates the evaluated context is the associated dispatch queue.
- **DispatchPredicate.onQueueAsBarrier(_:)**: A predicate that indicates the evaluated context is the associated dispatch queue as part of a barrier operation.

items.description: A predicate that indicates the evaluated context is the associated dispatch queue.
